title: THSI Derived Marker
description: A rule-derived marker mapped to a static graph node_id from raw observations and personal baseline.

marker_id.description: Unique identifier for this derived marker.

derived_node.description: Static graph node_id produced by the mapping rule.

derivation_rule.description: Human-readable description of the rule that produced this marker.

supporting_observations.description: observation_id values from raw observations that support this marker.

baseline_used.description: Baseline marker statistics used for comparison, or null when no baseline applied.

deviation_score.description: Numeric magnitude of deviation from baseline or reference.

confidence.description: Conservative confidence after quality, baseline, and deviation modifiers.

quality_score.description: Quality score propagated from supporting observation(s).
